briefing: Markets were neutral today (NASDAQ +0.3%, S&P 500 +0.2%) with no candidate showing the full multi-signal confirmation (MACD crossover, bullish RSI, price above SMA-20, and volume surge) our strategy requires for new buys. Holding cash and existing positions rather than forcing a trade into a low-conviction session.

daily_lesson.explanation_en: Dry powder refers to cash a portfolio keeps on the sidelines, ready to deploy when a genuinely strong opportunity appears. On a neutral day like today, holding cash instead of forcing a purchase preserves that flexibility for when market signals are more compelling.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 「乾火藥」（Dry Powder）指投資組合保留在場邊、隨時可動用的現金。在像今天這樣方向不明的中性市場中，與其勉強買進，不如保留現金，等待更明確、更具說服力的進場訊號出現。

market_education.summary_en: Major indices drifted in a narrow, low-volatility range today, with the NASDAQ up 0.3% and the S&P 500 up 0.2%. The muted move suggests investors were in a wait-and-see mode without a strong catalyst to push markets decisively in either direction. Trading activity appeared moderate, consistent with a market pausing to digest recent gains rather than reacting to fresh news.
market_education.summary_zh: 今日大盤走勢窄幅震盪，波動不大，納斯達克指數上漲0.3%，標普500指數上漲0.2%。這種溫和的漲幅顯示投資人普遍採取觀望態度，市場缺乏明確的催化劑來推動方向性走勢。成交量維持中等水平，反映市場正在消化近期漲幅，而非對突發消息做出反應。
